task_description: Improve UI interactivity: fix text entry box contrast and resizability, add hover effects to all clickable buttons that lack them (QuickActionsView buttons, chat input attach/send buttons), and increase clickable areas

verification.summary: swift build compiles cleanly. swift test passes all 220 tests with 0 failures. No new tests needed as changes are purely UI/visual (hover states, border styling, frame sizing) in SwiftUI views that cannot be unit tested without a running macOS UI. All changes follow existing codebase patterns (isHovered state + .onHover + withAnimation).
